# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with attached EBS volumes for application data (non-encrypted, no backup policies; quick start)

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.small
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3a.micro
      - t3a.small
      - t3a.medium
      - t3a.large
      - m6i.large
      - m6i.xlarge
      - m6a.large
      - m6a.xlarge
      - c6i.large
      - c6i.xlarge
      - c6a.large
      - c6a.xlarge
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional. Provide to enable SSH access.
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI ID (e.g., Amazon Linux 2023)
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 4
  DataVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 10
    MaxValue: 16384
  DataVolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp3
      - gp2
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
  DataDeviceName:
    Type: String
    Default: /dev/xvdb
  RootVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 1024
  SshCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR allowed to SSH (22). Tighten in production.
  AppPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 8080
  AppCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR allowed to reach the app port. Tighten in production.
  NamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: app

Conditions:
  HasKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
  CreateInstance2: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]]
  CreateInstance3: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3], !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]]
  CreateInstance4: !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EC2 security group for quick-start app instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SshCidr
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref AppPort
          ToPort: !Ref AppPort
          CidrIp: !Ref AppCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-sg'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles: []

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !If [HasKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
            GroupSet:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Encrypted: false
          - DeviceName: !Ref DataDeviceName
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Encrypted: false
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-instance'
          - ResourceType: volume
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-volume'
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -euo pipefail

            DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
            MOUNTPOINT="/data"

            mkdir -p "${MOUNTPOINT}"

            # Wait for device to appear
            for i in $(seq 1 60); do
              if [ -b "${DEVICE}" ]; then
                break
              fi
              sleep 2
            done

            # If the device exists and has no filesystem, create one
            if [ -b "${DEVICE}" ]; then
              if ! blkid "${DEVICE}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                mkfs -t xfs "${DEVICE}" || mkfs -t ext4 "${DEVICE}"
              fi

              # Add to fstab using UUID and mount
              UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "${DEVICE}")
              FSTYPE=$(blkid -s TYPE -o value "${DEVICE}")
              if ! grep -q "${UUID}" /etc/fstab; then
                echo "UUID=${UUID} ${MOUNTPOINT} ${FSTYPE} defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
              fi
              mount -a
              chown -R ec2-user:ec2-user "${MOUNTPOINT}" 2>/dev/null || true
              chmod 755 "${MOUNTPOINT}"
            fi

  Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-1'

  Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-2'

  Instance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-3'

  Instance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance4
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-4'

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  InstanceIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref Instance1
        - !If [CreateInstance2, !Ref Instance2, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        - !If [CreateInstance3, !Ref Instance3, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        - !If [CreateInstance4, !Ref Instance4, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
  DataMountPoint:
    Value: /data
  DataDeviceName:
    Value: !Ref DataDeviceName
